allow: Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('lucide-react'\); const matches = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('linked'\)\); console.log\(matches\);")

Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('lucide-react'\); const matches = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('facebook'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('instagram'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('link'\)\).slice\(0,20\); console.log\(matches\);")
